headline: ISRG Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Q1 was a solid start to the year for Intuitive, driven by 17% total procedure growth and broad-based adoption across da Vinci and Ion as customers continue to advance minimally invasive care.  In Q1, da Vinci procedures grew 16% to 847,000, and Ion procedures increased 39% to 43,000.  In the United States, da Vinci procedures grew 14% year-over-year, led by strength in general surgery.

headline: ISRG Q1 Deep Dive: Broader Platform Adoption and Innovation-Led Revenue Growth
summary: Medical technology company Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23% year on year to $2.77 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.50 per share was 18.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: ISRG Q1 Deep Dive: Broader Platform Adoption and Innovation-Led Revenue Growth
content.summary: Medical technology company Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23% year on year to $2.77 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.50 per share was 18.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Earnings Show Big Beats Don’t Always Spark Stock Rallies
summary: Intuitive Surgical  posted quarterly earnings and revenue that handily beat Wall Street’s projections.  The maker of surgical robots posted first-quarter adjusted earnings of $2.50 a share, outstripping calls for $2.12 a share.  For the full year, Intuitive is targeting an adjusted gross profit margin within a range of 67.5% and 68.5%.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Tops Q1 Expectations, Shares Move Higher
summary: Shares of Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) rose 2. 4% in premarket trading on Wednesday after the company reported first-quarter results that exceeded expectations on both revenue and earnings, supported by increased use of its robotic surgical systems.
